cards.back: Unary relational operation that returns a set of tuples that satisfy a given condition
Unary relational operation that returns a set of tuples with selected attributes
Binary relational operation that returns a set of tuples containing all tuples from two relations
Binary relational operation that returns a set of tuples containing all possible combinations of tuples from two relations
Unary relational operation that returns a set of tuples that satisfy a given condition, equivalent to SELECT * FROM table WHERE condition
